extra.reason: Added stepFrame() to EmulatorEngine that bypasses shouldRun guard. Updated MonitorStepper and AtticServer step handler to use stepFrame() so stepping works when paused.

Added shared BreakpointManager to CLIServerDelegate with BRK injection. Rewired set/clear/clearAll/list breakpoint commands, stepOver, and runUntil to use it instead of EmulatorEngine's Set-based polling.

Main emulation loop now handles .breakpoint result: pauses emulator, cleans up temp breakpoints, records hits, broadcasts CLIEvent.breakpoint to connected clients. Also added resume-from-breakpoint logic and reset/state-load cleanup.
